findings.title: SQL Injection via template literal in product search
findings.description: User-supplied query parameter interpolated via template literal into SQL LIKE clause without parameterization

findings.title: SQL Injection via status filter concatenation in helper function
findings.description: Helper function embeds user-supplied status filter value into SQL WHERE clause fragment via template literal

findings.title: SQL Injection via unvalidated ORDER BY sort direction
findings.description: Sort column is validated against allowlist but sort direction parameter is interpolated into ORDER BY clause without validation

findings.title: SQL Injection via dynamic column names and category concatenation in reports endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied field names interpolated into SELECT clause and category concatenated into WHERE clause without validation or parameterization
